first_run.rationale: The score is identical (3/10) in both evaluations, and the reasoning is substantively the same. Both versions correctly identify the three core issues: the candidate is severely overqualified for a junior role, lacks the required strong German language skills, and has peripheral Java experience. The minor differences in phrasing between the two evaluations are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any bias related to the change in location from Germany to Romania.
